name: lancommander
tagline: A self-hosted platform for managing and launching games over LAN
description: LANCommander is a self hosted platform for managing and launching games over a local network. It centralizes game files, metadata and launch configurations so LAN parties or shared setups can quickly start multiplayer sessions.

features.title: LAN Game Distribution
features.description: Distribute games to clients over a local network

features.title: Game Library Management
features.description: Organize games and versions in a central library

features.title: Client Management
features.description: Register and manage connected LAN clients

features.title: Authentication
features.description: Control access to the server and clients

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: Manage games and clients through a browser
